build.description: Primary build agent for Python/FastAPI/Docker/React. Self-corrects via ruff/mypy/pytest.

plan.description: Plan agent. Produces PRD/Tech Spec and impact analysis before implementation.

general.description: General-purpose agent with full tool access.

explore.description: Read-only exploration agent for codebase Q&A.

prd-manager.description: Product Manager persona. Drafts PRDs with acceptance criteria.

architect.description: Domain Architect persona. Designs FastAPI/Docker/React architecture and Tech Specs.

architect-reviewer.description: Architecture Reviewer persona. Reviews Tech Specs for YAGNI, async safety, Docker.

implementer.description: Implementer persona. Writes Python/React code with self-correction loop.

implementer-reviewer.description: Code Reviewer persona. Reviews PRs for async safety, types, Docker, tests.

team-reviewer.description: Panel reviewer integrating Architect/Security/Performance/QA perspectives into one report.

qa-engineer.description: QA Engineer persona. Designs test cases and writes pytest/vitest tests.

sre.description: SRE persona. Optimizes Docker/infra, healthchecks, and deployment safety.

tech-lead.description: Tech Lead persona. Coordinates agents, triages decisions, enforces GEMINI.md.

project-manager.description: Project Manager persona. Tracks progress, blockers, and next actions.
